location_precision.why: Every one of the eight findings carries a usable file:line reference (e.g. "src/sync.py:14", "src/report.py:11").

interaction_synthesis.why: The report.py:11 finding mechanistically links two defects — sync writing "empty-string emails ... for users with null staged emails" causes the report's `.split("@")[1]` to raise IndexError.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states a failure mechanism rather than a label, e.g. floor division means "the final partial page is never fetched" and the mutable default "persists across invocations, so a second call ... silently skips every user id."
